title: mentha × rotundifolia
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia, also known as round-leaved mint or corn mint, is a hybrid species of mint native to Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Mentha × rotundifolia include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to soothe headaches and improve respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, making it a popular choice in natural medicine.
